en: I'll pass this time. / I think I'll sit this one out.
notes: "sit this one out" =「今回は見送る」

en: That might be tough. / I don't think I can.
notes: 直接 "No" と言わずに断る

jp: 気持ちだけ受け取っとく。
en: I appreciate the thought. / Thanks, but I'm good.
notes: "I appreciate the thought." は気持ちへの感謝を示す定番

en: I'll pass today. / Not today.
notes: "Not today." はカジュアルな断り

en: I'll pass. / I'll skip this one.
notes: "pass" は断りの万能表現

en: Ask me again next time. / Rain check?
notes: "rain check" =「また今度」。非常によく使うイディオム

jp: その日はちょっと無理。
en: I can't make it that day.
notes: "make it" =「都合がつく」

en: Maybe ask someone else. / Try asking someone else.
notes: "maybe" で柔らかくする

jp: 私には向いてないかも。
en: I don't think it's for me.
notes: "not for me" はよく使う婉曲表現

jp: 興味はあるけど今は無理。
en: I'm interested, but I can't right now.
notes: "right now" で「今は」を強調

en: Let me think about it.
notes: 即答を避ける丁寧な表現

en: I can't give you an answer right away.
notes: "right away" =「すぐに」

en: I'm sorry, but. / I hate to say this, but.
notes: "I hate to say this, but..." は断りの前置き

jp: 行きたいけど行けない。
en: I wish I could, but I can't.
notes: "I wish I could" は残念さを伝える定番

en: I'll definitely make it next time. / Next time for sure.
notes: "for sure" =「絶対」

en: I appreciate it though. / That's sweet of you.
notes: "though" を付けると「でもありがたい」のニュアンス

jp: 今はちょっとやめておきたい。
en: I'd rather not right now.
notes: "I'd rather not" =「できれば〜したくない」

en: If I have time. / If I can manage it.
notes: 曖昧な返答で可能性を残す

en: I'm not going to push it. / I'll take it easy.
notes: "push it" =「無理をする」

en: I already have plans. / I'm already booked.
notes: "I have plans" は断りの定番。具体的に言う必要はない
